name: Reeze, Whirlwind of Gusto
name_jp: ガスタの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>疾</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>風</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぷう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> リーズ
desc: Once per turn: You can return 1 card from your hand to the bottom of the Deck to target 1 monster your opponent controls and 1 face-up "Gusto" monster you control; switch control of both monsters.
mnst_eff: Once per turn: You can return 1 card from your hand to the bottom of the Deck to target 1 monster your opponent controls and 1 face-up "Gusto" monster you control; switch control of both monsters.
eff: Once per turn: You can return 1 card from your hand to the bottom of the Deck to target 1 monster your opponent controls and 1 face-up "Gusto" monster you control; switch control of both monsters.

action: Places cards from the player's hand on the bottom of the Deck for cost
Takes control of an opponent's monster
